auth.commandRoomTitle: Orchestrate every sale, stock move, and insight in one luminous control room.
auth.commandRoomSubtitle: Built for Tanzanian commerce teams who need instant clarity across branches, batches, and margins. Secure, fast, and ready to scale.
auth.secureAccessTitle: Secure access to your branches, stock, and sales.
auth.secureAccessSubtitle: Luxury black + gold interface designed for clarity and speed. Sign in to manage products, track stock movement, record sales, and monitor alerts across branches.
auth.branchReadySubtitle: Sales, transfers, and stock rules built for multi-branch operations.
auth.fastProductSetupSubtitle: Create SKUs, pricing, barcode, and low-stock thresholds quickly.
auth.financeSnapshotsSubtitle: Revenue vs expenses overview with clear indicators and trends.
auth.builtinHelpSubtitle: Manual + assistant to guide users and reduce training time.
auth.commandRoomFormSubtitle: Secure access for operators and system owners.

categories.title: Import Categories
categories.what: Create new categories or update existing ones. If a category with the same name already exists, its status and parent will be updated. If it doesn't exist, a new category is created.
categories.template: The template is blank — type your category names, statuses (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, or ARCHIVED), and optionally a parent category name for subcategories. Leave the parent column empty for top-level categories.
categories.multiVariant: Categories don't have variants — each row is one category.
categories.apply: When applied: existing categories with the same name are updated. New names create new categories. Parent categories are resolved by name — if the parent doesn't exist yet, list it on an earlier row so it's created first.
categories.notes: Tip: Plan your top-level categories first, then subcategories. You cannot delete categories via import — archive them instead by setting status to ARCHIVED.

products.title: Import Products & Variants
products.what: Create new products with their variants in bulk. Each row represents one variant. Multiple rows with the same product_name are grouped into a single product with multiple variants.
products.template: The template is blank — fill in product names, categories, variant names, pricing, and optionally SKUs, barcodes, units, and branch availability. Required columns: product_name, category, status, variant_name.
products.multiVariant: For a product with 3 variants (e.g. Small, Medium, Large), create 3 rows with the same product_name but different variant_name values. The system groups them automatically.
products.apply: When applied: new products and variants are created. Categories are auto-created if they don't exist. If branch columns are included, variants are marked available only at branches with 'yes'. If no branch columns are filled, the variant is available everywhere.
products.notes: Tip: price, cost, base_unit, sell_unit, conversion_factor, and track_stock are shown as required columns but the system will accept them empty — however, a variant without a price cannot be sold at POS. Set both base_unit and sell_unit to 'piece' if you don't need unit conversions.

opening_stock.title: Import Opening Stock
opening_stock.what: Set initial stock quantities for your variants across branches. Use this when setting up your inventory for the first time or when loading stock balances from another system.
opening_stock.template: The template comes pre-filled with all your active variants (product name, variant name, SKU, and current unit cost). Your branch names appear as column headers — type the stock quantity for each branch. Leave a branch column empty to skip that branch.
opening_stock.multiVariant: Each variant gets its own row. A product with 3 variants shows as 3 separate rows, each with the product name repeated.
opening_stock.apply: When applied: a stock movement of type OPENING_BALANCE is created for each variant+branch combination where you entered a quantity. The stock snapshot is updated (quantities are added to existing stock, not replaced). If unit_cost is provided, a stock purchase cost expense is recorded.
opening_stock.notes: Tip: If you want to SET stock to a specific number (not add to existing), make sure the variant has zero stock first. Opening stock adds to whatever is already there. Batch tracking is optional — leave batch_id and expiry_date empty if you don't track batches.

price_updates.title: Import Price Updates
price_updates.what: Update selling prices, minimum prices, and VAT modes for existing variants in bulk. Does not create new products — only updates existing ones.
price_updates.template: The template comes pre-filled with all your active variants showing their current price, VAT mode, and minimum price. Change the values you want to update and leave the rest as-is — unchanged rows are automatically skipped.
price_updates.multiVariant: Each variant gets its own row with its current price. A product with 3 variants shows as 3 rows — you can update each variant's price independently.
price_updates.apply: When applied: only rows where the price, VAT mode, or minimum price actually changed are updated. Unchanged rows are skipped entirely — no unnecessary database writes. The audit log shows one summary entry with how many rows were changed vs unchanged.
price_updates.notes: Tip: Download the template, open it in a spreadsheet, change the prices you need, and re-upload. You don't need to delete rows you didn't change — the system ignores them automatically.

status_updates.title: Import Status Updates
status_updates.what: Change the status (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, ARCHIVED) of products and their variants in bulk. Useful for seasonal deactivation or reactivation of product ranges.
status_updates.template: The template comes pre-filled with all your products and their current statuses. For multi-variant products, each variant appears on its own row. For single-variant products, the variant_name column is empty — changing the status applies to the entire product and all its variants.
status_updates.multiVariant: Multi-variant products: each variant is listed separately so you can set different statuses per variant. Single-variant products: one row with an empty variant_name column — the status change applies to both the product and its variant.
status_updates.apply: When applied: only rows where the status actually changed are updated. If you change a product's status without specifying a variant_name, all variants under that product are also updated to the same status.
status_updates.notes: Tip: Set a product to INACTIVE to hide it from POS and catalog without losing its data. Use ARCHIVED for products you'll never sell again. You can reactivate by changing the status back to ACTIVE.

suppliers.title: Import Suppliers
suppliers.what: Create new suppliers or update existing ones. If a supplier with the same name already exists, its details (phone, email, address, etc.) are updated. New names create new suppliers.
suppliers.template: The template is blank — fill in supplier names, statuses, and optionally phone, email, address, notes, and lead time in days. Required columns: name, status.
suppliers.multiVariant: Suppliers don't have variants — each row is one supplier.
suppliers.apply: When applied: existing suppliers with the same name are updated with any new details. New names create new supplier records. Only changed fields are updated — if you leave a field the same, it's skipped.
suppliers.notes: Tip: Setting lead_time_days helps the system calculate expected delivery dates on purchase orders. Phone is required in the template header but won't block the import if left empty for individual rows.

branches.title: Import Branches
branches.what: Create new branch locations. This import only creates — it does not update existing branches. Branch names must be unique.
branches.template: The template is blank — fill in branch names, statuses, and optionally address and phone number. Required columns: name, status.
branches.multiVariant: Branches don't have variants — each row is one branch.
branches.apply: When applied: new branches are created. If a branch with the same name already exists, that row is skipped with an error. Branches cannot be updated via import — edit them in Settings > Branches instead.
branches.notes: Tip: Branch names must be unique. Your subscription tier limits how many branches you can have — Starter allows 1, Business allows 5, Enterprise is unlimited.

users.title: Import Users
users.what: Invite new users or update existing ones. New users receive a temporary password and must reset it on first login. Existing users (matched by email) have their name and phone updated.
users.template: The template is blank — fill in name, email, role, status, and optionally phone. Branch columns appear at the end if you have multiple branches — type 'yes' to assign the user's role to specific branches, or leave all branch columns empty to assign to all branches.
users.multiVariant: Users don't have variants. If a user has multiple roles, create one row per role with the same email.
users.apply: When applied: new emails create new user accounts with a temporary password (they must reset it on first login). Existing emails update the user's name and phone. Role assignments are created or updated based on the role and branch columns.
users.notes: Tip: The role name must match an existing role in your system exactly. Your subscription tier limits how many users you can have — Starter allows 5, Business allows 15, Enterprise is unlimited.

customers.title: Import Customers
customers.what: Create new customers or update existing ones. If a customer with the same name already exists, their details are updated. New names create new customer records.
customers.template: The template is blank — fill in customer names, statuses, and optionally phone, email, TIN (tax ID), and notes. Required columns: name, status.
customers.multiVariant: Customers don't have variants — each row is one customer.
customers.apply: When applied: existing customers with the same name are updated. New names create new customer records. Only changed fields are updated.
customers.notes: Tip: The TIN field is for tax identification numbers used in formal invoicing. Customer phone numbers can be used for WhatsApp receipt delivery if that feature is enabled.

units.title: Import Units of Measurement
units.what: Create new units of measurement (e.g. piece, kg, box, liter). This import only creates — it does not update existing units. Unit codes must be unique.
units.template: The template is blank — fill in unit codes (e.g. 'piece', 'kg'), display labels (e.g. 'Piece', 'Kilogram'), and optionally a unit type (COUNT, WEIGHT, VOLUME, LENGTH, or OTHER). If no type is provided, it defaults to COUNT.
units.multiVariant: Units don't have variants — each row is one unit.
units.apply: When applied: new units are created. If a unit with the same code already exists, that row is skipped with an error.
units.notes: Tip: Create all the units you need before importing products, since products reference units by code. The system comes with default units (piece, kg, etc.) — you only need to import custom units specific to your business.

stock_counts.title: Import Stock Counts
stock_counts.what: Record physical stock counts for multiple variants across branches at once. The system calculates the variance (counted vs expected) and adjusts stock accordingly.
stock_counts.template: The template comes pre-filled with all your active variants (product name, variant name, SKU). Your branch names appear as column headers — type the quantity you physically counted for each branch. Leave a branch column empty to skip counting that variant at that branch.
stock_counts.multiVariant: Each variant gets its own row. A product with 3 variants shows as 3 separate rows. Enter the counted quantity for each variant at each branch independently.
stock_counts.apply: When applied: for each variant+branch where you entered a count, the system calculates the variance (your count minus the expected quantity). A stock count variance movement is recorded and the stock snapshot is updated to match your counted quantity.
stock_counts.notes: Tip: Use the reason column to explain why you're counting (e.g. 'Monthly count', 'Quarterly audit'). Stock count shortages reduce profit in your P&L report. Count carefully — the system trusts your numbers and adjusts stock immediately.

products.product_name: Product name (rows with the same name are grouped into one product)
products.category: Category name (auto-created if it doesn't exist)
products.vat_mode: VAT mode: INCLUSIVE, EXCLUSIVE, or EXEMPT
products.conversion_factor: How many base units in one sell unit (e.g. 24)
products.track_stock: Track stock for this variant: true or false

importGuide.branchAvailability: Type "yes" to make available at {branch} (leave empty to skip)

price_updates.vat_mode: VAT mode: INCLUSIVE, EXCLUSIVE, or EXEMPT

status_updates.status: New status: ACTIVE, INACTIVE, or ARCHIVED
status_updates.variant_name: Specific variant to update (leave empty to update all variants)

users.name: Full name
users.role: Role name (must already exist in the system)
users.status: Status: ACTIVE, SUSPENDED, DEACTIVATED, or PENDING

units.code: Unit code (e.g. piece, kg, box). Must be unique.
units.label: Display name (e.g. Piece, Kilogram, Box)
units.unit_type: Type: COUNT, WEIGHT, VOLUME, LENGTH, or OTHER

stock_counts.sku: Variant SKU (alternative to product name + variant name)
stock_counts.variant_id: Variant ID (alternative to product name + variant name)
stock_counts.reason: Reason for the count (e.g. Monthly count, Audit)

typeDesc.priceUpdates: Update selling prices and VAT settings for existing variants.
typeDesc.statusUpdates: Activate, deactivate, or archive products in bulk.
typeDesc.suppliers: Add or update your supplier directory.
typeDesc.branches: Create new branch locations for your business.
typeDesc.users: Invite new users or update existing team members.
typeDesc.customers: Add or update your customer records.
typeDesc.stockCounts: Record physical stock counts and reconcile inventory.

categories.what: Create new categories or update existing ones. If a category with the same name already exists, its status and parent will be updated. If it doesn't exist, a new category is created.
categories.notes: Plan your top-level categories first, then subcategories. You cannot delete categories via import — archive them instead by setting status to ARCHIVED.
categories.apply: When applied: existing categories with the same name are updated. New names create new categories. Parent categories are resolved by name — if the parent doesn't exist yet, list it on an earlier row so it's created first.

products.what: Create new products with their variants in bulk. Each row represents one variant. Multiple rows with the same product_name are grouped into a single product with multiple variants.
products.notes: Price, cost, base_unit, sell_unit, conversion_factor, and track_stock are shown as required but the system will accept them empty — however, a variant without a price cannot be sold at POS. Set both base_unit and sell_unit to 'piece' if you don't need unit conversions.
products.apply: When applied: new products and variants are created. Categories are auto-created if they don't exist. If branch columns are included, variants are marked available only at branches with 'yes'.

openingStock.what: Set initial stock quantities for your variants across branches. Use this when setting up your inventory for the first time or when loading stock balances from another system.
openingStock.notes: If you want to SET stock to a specific number (not add to existing), make sure the variant has zero stock first. Opening stock adds to whatever is already there. Batch tracking is optional.
openingStock.apply: When applied: a stock movement of type OPENING_BALANCE is created for each variant+branch combination where you entered a quantity. The stock snapshot is updated (quantities are added to existing stock, not replaced).

priceUpdates.what: Update selling prices, minimum prices, and VAT modes for existing variants in bulk. Does not create new products — only updates existing ones.
priceUpdates.notes: Download the template, open it in a spreadsheet, change the prices you need, and re-upload. You don't need to delete rows you didn't change — the system ignores them automatically.
priceUpdates.apply: When applied: only rows where the price, VAT mode, or minimum price actually changed are updated. Unchanged rows are skipped entirely.

statusUpdates.what: Change the status (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, ARCHIVED) of products and their variants in bulk. Useful for seasonal deactivation or reactivation of product ranges.
statusUpdates.notes: Set a product to INACTIVE to hide it from POS and catalog without losing its data. Use ARCHIVED for products you'll never sell again. You can reactivate by changing the status back to ACTIVE.
statusUpdates.apply: When applied: only rows where the status actually changed are updated. If you change a product's status without specifying a variant_name, all variants under that product are also updated.

suppliers.what: Create new suppliers or update existing ones. If a supplier with the same name already exists, its details are updated. New names create new suppliers.
suppliers.notes: Setting lead_time_days helps the system calculate expected delivery dates on purchase orders. Phone is required in the template header but won't block the import if left empty.
suppliers.apply: When applied: existing suppliers with the same name are updated with any new details. New names create new supplier records.

branches.what: Create new branch locations. This import only creates — it does not update existing branches. Branch names must be unique.
branches.notes: Branch names must be unique. Your subscription tier limits how many branches you can have — Starter allows 1, Business allows 5, Enterprise is unlimited.
branches.apply: When applied: new branches are created. If a branch with the same name already exists, that row is skipped with an error.

users.what: Invite new users or update existing ones. New users receive a temporary password and must reset it on first login. Existing users (matched by email) have their name and phone updated.

users.apply: When applied: new emails create new user accounts with a temporary password. Existing emails update the user's name and phone.

customers.what: Create new customers or update existing ones. If a customer with the same name already exists, their details are updated. New names create new customer records.
customers.notes: The TIN field is for tax identification numbers used in formal invoicing. Customer phone numbers can be used for WhatsApp receipt delivery if enabled.
customers.apply: When applied: existing customers with the same name are updated. New names create new customer records.

units.what: Create new units of measurement (e.g. piece, kg, box, liter). This import only creates — it does not update existing units. Unit codes must be unique.
units.notes: Create all the units you need before importing products, since products reference units by code. The system comes with default units — you only need to import custom units.
units.apply: When applied: new units are created. If a unit with the same code already exists, that row is skipped with an error.

stockCounts.what: Record physical stock counts for multiple variants across branches at once. The system calculates the variance (counted vs expected) and adjusts stock accordingly.
stockCounts.notes: Use the reason column to explain why you're counting (e.g. 'Monthly count', 'Quarterly audit'). Stock count shortages reduce profit in your P&L report. Count carefully — the system trusts your numbers.
stockCounts.apply: When applied: for each variant+branch where you entered a count, the system calculates the variance and adjusts stock to match your counted quantity.

offlinePage.title: Offline mode
offlinePage.subtitle: Device management, sync control, and offline queue health at a glance.
offlinePage.syncBlocked: Sync blocked. Reconnect before offline use.
offlinePage.cacheTruncated: Catalog cache is partial — your catalog exceeds the offline limit. Some products may be unavailable offline.
offlinePage.noDeviceDescription: Register this device to enable offline mode with automatic sync.
offlinePage.revokeDeviceConfirmMessage: This will permanently revoke offline access and clear all local data. Are you sure?
offlinePage.syncFailed: Sync failed. Offline mode frozen until reconnected.
offlinePage.autoSyncRetrying: Offline sync failed — will retry automatically.
offlinePage.encryptionNote: Offline data is encrypted locally in IndexedDB.
offlinePage.riskWarning: Sync as soon as you reconnect to avoid data conflicts.
offlinePage.pinOptional: Set an optional device-specific PIN for offline access.
offlinePage.noReceiptsDescription: Offline receipts will appear here after they are synced.

offlineConflictsPage.title: Offline conflicts
offlineConflictsPage.subtitle: Review conflicts from offline sync and resolve them.
offlineConflictsPage.emptyDescription: Everything is synced — no conflicts to resolve.
offlineConflictsPage.vatChanged: VAT mode changed — dismiss and reprocess this sale online.

productsPage.title: Products
productsPage.subtitle: Manage product records and assign variants.
productsPage.wizardHint: Prefer a guided flow? Use the product wizard to create variants and initial stock in one go.
productsPage.primaryRequired: Primary image required to publish product cards.
productsPage.uploadPrimaryHint: Upload a primary image first — additional images can be added after.
productsPage.uploadZoneHint: Click to upload · PNG or JPEG · max 20 MB

priceListsPage.subtitle: Configure customer or branch pricing overrides.
priceListsPage.setItemFailed: Failed to set price list item.
priceListsPage.removeItemFailed: Failed to remove price list item.
priceListsPage.undoConfirmMessage: This will revert the last batch of price changes on this list.
priceListsPage.emptyDescription: Create your first price list to configure custom pricing for customers or branches.

variantsPage.title: Variants
variantsPage.subtitle: Manage SKUs, prices, VAT modes, and barcode assignments.
variantsPage.barcodeReasonRequired: Reason is required to reassign a barcode.
variantsPage.skuReasonRequired: Reason is required to reassign a SKU.
variantsPage.labelsSelectRequired: Select at least one variant for labels.
variantsPage.scanNotFound: Barcode not found or matches multiple variants.
variantsPage.scanCameraFailed: Unable to access camera for scanning.
variantsPage.conversionHint: 1 sell unit equals this many base units.

businessSettingsPage.title: Business settings
businessSettingsPage.subtitle: Update business name and default settings.
businessSettingsPage.recipientsHint: Select which roles and individual users should receive notifications. Both selections are combined — anyone matching a selected role OR listed as a specific user will be notified.
businessSettingsPage.recipientOwnerAlwaysIncluded: The business owner always receives notifications automatically.
businessSettingsPage.eventMatrixHint: Enable or disable individual events and choose which channels deliver them. Group-level toggles set the default for all events in that group — override per event below.
businessSettingsPage.subscriptionRequestsUnavailable: Subscription requests unavailable for this account.
businessSettingsPage.trialDeleteNotice: Your trial ends on {trialEndsAt}. If you do not activate a paid subscription, your account and all data will be permanently deleted on {deleteDate}.
businessSettingsPage.subscriptionRequestsSubtitle: Request a subscription, upgrade, or cancellation for platform review.
businessSettingsPage.subscriptionPaymentNote: Payment is handled outside the system. After submitting, you will be contacted with payment instructions.
businessSettingsPage.pendingRequestNotice: You already have a pending subscription request. Please wait for it to be reviewed before submitting another.
businessSettingsPage.alreadyHighestTier: You are on the highest subscription tier. No upgrades are available.
businessSettingsPage.subscribeHint: Choose the tier you want to subscribe to and for how long. You can keep your current tier or move to a higher one.
businessSettingsPage.upgradeHint: Select a higher tier to upgrade to. Your current usage and data will carry over.
businessSettingsPage.cancelHint: Requesting cancellation will end your subscription. Your data will be retained for 30 days after cancellation.
businessSettingsPage.noSubscriptionActionsAvailable: No subscription actions are currently available.
businessSettingsPage.unitsSubtitle: Add custom units for this business. Global units remain available.
businessSettingsPage.defaultsSubtitle: Edit requires explicit save to apply.
businessSettingsPage.readOnlyHint: Settings are read-only until you enter edit mode.
businessSettingsPage.notificationChannelsHint: Channels apply across all events. In-app alerts are always on.
businessSettingsPage.notificationRecipientsHint: Choose who can receive notifications across all events.
businessSettingsPage.notificationWhatsappEnterprise: WhatsApp recipients are available on Enterprise tiers.
businessSettingsPage.notificationEventsHint: Choose which events fire, which channels they use, and who receives them.

notificationGroupHint.system: System limits, reminders, and grace warnings.

businessSettingsPage.localizationHint: Currency and timezone drive receipts, reports, and POS displays.
businessSettingsPage.stockPoliciesHint: FEFO and expiry policies apply only when batch tracking is enabled.
businessSettingsPage.allowPriceEdit: Allow cashiers to edit item prices at POS
businessSettingsPage.refundReturnStock: Refunds return to stock by default
businessSettingsPage.offlineNotAvailable: Offline mode is not available on your current subscription plan. Upgrade to Business or Enterprise to configure offline limits.
businessSettingsPage.offlineMaxHint: Your plan allows up to {hours}h offline and {sales} sales. You can set a lower custom limit.
businessSettingsPage.deleteBusinessSubtitle: This archives the business and immediately blocks access.
businessSettingsPage.deleteBusinessIdPlaceholder: Type your Business ID to confirm
businessSettingsPage.deleteBusinessHint: This is irreversible unless a platform admin restores the business.
businessSettingsPage.deleteValidationFailed: Confirm business ID, password, and DELETE text.
businessSettingsPage.deleteNoAccess: You do not have access to delete this business.
businessSettingsPage.expenseCategoriesSubtitle: Manage categories for organizing business expenses

branchesPage.title: Branches
branchesPage.subtitle: Manage branch locations and contact details.
branchesPage.phoneCountryCodeHint: Include country code, e.g. +255 712 345 678 for Tanzania
branchesPage.emptyDescription: Create your first branch to start managing locations.

rolesPage.title: Roles
rolesPage.subtitle: Create roles and assign permission sets.
rolesPage.permissionGuideBody: Pick the smallest access that still lets the role do its job. Use presets to speed up setup.
rolesPage.permissionPresetFullHint: Full access: sensitive or irreversible actions.
rolesPage.approvalAuthorityHint: This level determines what this role can do in the system hierarchy. A higher level can: approve or reject requests from lower levels, assign and remove roles below their level, modify permissions of lower-level roles, deactivate users with lower-level roles, and create new roles below their level. The System Owner has the highest level and can do everything. Choose carefully — setting the wrong level can give a role too much or too little authority.
rolesPage.tierNone: None — no approval or management authority
rolesPage.tierStaff: Staff level — can approve requests from None-level roles, assign and manage None-level roles
rolesPage.tierManagement: Management level — can approve Staff and None-level requests, assign and manage Staff and None-level roles
rolesPage.cloneConfirmMessage: A copy of "{role}" will be created with the same permissions.
rolesPage.emptyHint: Create your first role to get started.
rolesPage.selectRoleHint: Select a role to view permissions
rolesPage.selectRoleDescription: Choose a role from the list to view and edit its permission set.

businessRead.title: Business profile
businessRead.description: Allows viewing business profile, locale, and subscription details.

businessUpdate.title: Update business profile
businessUpdate.description: Allows editing business profile, locale, and default settings.

businessDelete.title: Delete business

settingsRead.title: System settings
settingsRead.description: Allows viewing system-wide settings and configuration.

settingsWrite.title: Update settings

subscriptionRead.title: Subscription status
subscriptionRead.description: Allows viewing plan, billing, and subscription status.

subscriptionRequest.title: Manage subscription changes
subscriptionRequest.description: Allows requesting plan changes or trial extensions.

usersRead.description: Allows viewing user list and profiles.

priceListsManage.description: Allows creating, updating, and assigning price lists.

stockRead.title: View stock
stockRead.description: Allows viewing stock on hand and stock movement history.

stockWrite.title: Adjust stock
stockWrite.description: Allows creating stock adjustments and moving stock.

transfersRead.title: View transfers

transfersWrite.title: Create transfers
transfersWrite.description: Allows creating and updating stock transfers.

shiftsClose.title: Close shift
shiftsClose.description: Allows closing POS shifts and cashouts.

salesRead.title: View sales
salesRead.description: Allows viewing receipts, sales history, and sales totals.

salesWrite.title: Process sales
salesWrite.description: Allows creating sales, receipts, and refunds.

salesCreditCreate.title: Create sales credit
salesCreditCreate.description: Allows creating credit sales or customer credit.

salesCreditSettle.title: Settle sales credit
salesCreditSettle.description: Allows settling credit balances or marking as paid.

salesReturnWithoutReceipt.title: Return without receipt
salesReturnWithoutReceipt.description: Allows processing returns without a receipt.

customersRead.title: View customers
customersRead.description: Allows viewing customer list and profiles.

customersSensitiveRead.title: View sensitive data
customersSensitiveRead.description: Allows viewing sensitive customer data (contacts, IDs).

purchasesRead.title: View purchases
purchasesRead.description: Allows viewing purchase orders and receiving records.

purchasesWrite.title: Manage purchases
purchasesWrite.description: Allows creating and updating purchase orders and receiving.

exportsWrite.title: Export data
exportsWrite.description: Allows exporting reports and data files.

importsWrite.title: Import data
importsWrite.description: Allows importing data via CSV — products, stock, prices, and other bulk operations.

approvalsRead.title: View approvals
approvalsRead.description: Allows viewing approval requests and status.

offlineRead.title: View offline status
offlineRead.description: Allows viewing offline queue and sync status.

offlineWrite.title: Manage offline sync

notesManage.title: Manage notes

supportChatUse.title: Use support chat

platformConsole.dangerSuspendDesc: Block all data writes. Reads still work.
platformConsole.dangerArchiveDesc: Move to archived state. Sessions revoked, data preserved.
platformConsole.dangerDeleteReadyDesc: Mark for permanent deletion. Reversible only via restore.

platformConsole.dangerPurgeDesc: Permanently delete ALL data. Cannot be undone.

platformConsole.actionPurgeConfirmId: Type the business ID to confirm
platformConsole.actionPurgeConfirmText: Type DELETE in capitals to confirm

SUSPEND.title: Suspend business
SUSPEND.description: Suspending will block all data writes for this business. Existing reads will still work. Active sessions will be force-logged out.

ARCHIVE.title: Archive business
ARCHIVE.description: Archiving moves the business to a frozen state. Sessions are revoked. Data is preserved but the business cannot be used.

DELETE_READY.title: Mark delete-ready
DELETE_READY.description: This marks the business as ready for permanent deletion. The data is still recoverable until purge.

RESTORE.title: Restore business
RESTORE.description: Restore this business to active status. Users will be able to log in again.

PURGE.title: Purge business
PURGE.description: Permanently delete ALL data including sales, stock, users, and history. This action CANNOT be undone.

stockAdjustmentsPage.unitHintAdjustment: Enter the quantity in your selected unit. The system automatically converts to the base unit for stock tracking. For example, adjusting 24 bottles with a 12:1 conversion stores as 2 cases.

stockCountsPage.title: Stock Counts
stockCountsPage.subtitle: Record physical counts and generate variance adjustments.
stockCountsPage.hintRecordedAsLoss: This will be recorded as a loss in your reports.
stockCountsPage.hintRecordedAsCost: This will be recorded as a stock purchase cost in your reports.
stockCountsPage.hintNoFinancialImpact: This will not affect your profit or loss reports.
stockCountsPage.unitHintCount: Count in your preferred unit — the system converts to the base unit automatically. If you count 24 bottles and the base unit is cases (12 per case), the system records 2 cases.

searchPage.title: Global Search
searchPage.subtitle: Find barcodes, products, receipts, customers, and transfers.
searchPage.barcodeScanHint: Paste or scan a barcode to search.
searchPage.emptyPreSearchDesc: Type a keyword, scan a barcode, or use a saved search to find what you need.
searchPage.noResultsDesc: Try a different keyword or check your spelling.

shiftsPage.title: Shifts
shiftsPage.subtitle: Open and close cash drawer shifts with variance tracking.
shiftsPage.emptyDescription: Open your first shift to start tracking cash sessions.

receiptsPage.title: Receipts
receiptsPage.subtitle: View and reprint receipts from completed sales.
receiptsPage.returnItemRequired: Add at least one return item.

unitHelp.title: How do units work?
unitHelp.tip: If you don't plan on using unit conversions, just leave both units set to 'Piece' — no conversion happens and quantities work as-is.
unitHelp.baseUnitDesc: How you count stock internally (e.g. piece, ml, gram). This is what the system tracks in your inventory.
unitHelp.sellUnitDesc: What you sell to customers (e.g. box, bottle, kg bag). This is what appears on receipts and in the POS.
unitHelp.factorDesc: How many base units are in one sell unit. If both units are the same, this is 1.
unitHelp.exampleScenario: You track rice in kilograms but sell it in 5kg bags:
unitHelp.exampleResult: Selling 2 bags removes 10 kg from stock (2 × 5 = 10)
unitHelp.examplePrice: If the bag price is TZS 15,000, that's TZS 3,000 per kg
unitHelp.simpleDesc: If you sell items one by one (1 item = 1 item), set both base and sell unit to 'Piece' and leave the conversion factor at 1. No conversion will happen — what you enter is what you get.

transfersPage.title: Transfers
transfersPage.subtitle: Create, approve, and receive inter-branch transfers.
transfersPage.itemRequired: Add at least one transfer item.
transfersPage.approveConfirmMessage: Stock will move between branches once approved.

expensesPage.title: Expenses
expensesPage.subtitle: Track operational costs and transfer fees.
expensesPage.filtersSubtitle: Narrow by branch, category, or date range.
expensesPage.titlePlaceholder: Expense title (e.g. March Rent, Office Supplies)
expensesPage.emptyDescription: Record your first expense to start tracking operational costs.

profilePage.title: Profile
profilePage.subtitle: Your account at a glance — details, roles, and permissions.
profilePage.emailReadOnlyHint: Email cannot be changed from this page.
profilePage.permissionsSubtitle: Grouped by module from your active roles. Tap a module to expand.
profilePage.requestAccessHint: Ask the system owner to grant extra permissions.
profilePage.allPermissionsGranted: You already have all available permissions.
profilePage.phoneCountryCodeHint: Include country code, e.g. +255 712 345 678 for Tanzania
profilePage.displaySizeHint: Adjust the text size across the entire system

changePasswordPage.title: Change password
changePasswordPage.subtitle: Update your current password and keep your account secure.
changePasswordPage.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
changePasswordPage.securityHint: Keep your account safe by using a strong, unique password.
changePasswordPage.passwordRequirements: Minimum 8 characters. Use a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols.

purchaseOrderWizard.title: Purchase order wizard
purchaseOrderWizard.subtitle: Create, approve, and receive stock in one guided flow.
purchaseOrderWizard.reorderSuggestionsLink: Check reorder suggestions on the Purchase Orders page
purchaseOrderWizard.unitHintPurchase: Select the unit you're purchasing in. The system tracks stock in the base unit and converts automatically.

stockCountWizard.title: Stock count wizard
stockCountWizard.subtitle: Capture multiple counts and submit them together.
stockCountWizard.barcodeLookupFailed: No variant found for this barcode.
stockCountWizard.partialSubmitNote: {valid} valid lines will be submitted, {invalid} invalid lines will be kept for correction.
stockCountWizard.unitHintCount: Count in your preferred unit — the system converts to the base unit automatically. If you count 24 bottles and the base unit is cases (12 per case), the system records 2 cases.

transferWizard.title: Transfer wizard
transferWizard.subtitle: Create, approve, and receive a transfer in one flow.
transferWizard.unitHintTransfer: Transfer quantities are always in the base unit. No unit conversion needed.

priceListWizard.title: Bulk price update wizard
priceListWizard.subtitle: Preview and apply pricing changes in bulk.
priceListWizard.scopeSubtitle: Select a price list and choose which variants to target.
priceListWizard.scopeAllDesc: Apply pricing changes to every variant in your catalogue, including those not yet on this list.
priceListWizard.scopeExistingDesc: Only update variants that already have a price override on this list.
priceListWizard.adjustSubtitle: Choose a pricing strategy and enter the adjustment value.
priceListWizard.modeAddDesc: Add or subtract a fixed amount
priceListWizard.modeSetDesc: Set an exact price for all
priceListWizard.previewSubtitle: Review the financial impact of your pricing changes before applying.
priceListWizard.applySubtitle: Review the summary and apply your pricing changes.

suppliersPage.title: Suppliers
suppliersPage.subtitle: Manage supplier records and status.
suppliersPage.name: Supplier name
suppliersPage.phoneCountryCodeHint: Include country code, e.g. +255 712 345 678 for Tanzania

supplierReturnsPage.title: Supplier Returns
supplierReturnsPage.subtitle: Record returns to suppliers and track stock out movements.
supplierReturnsPage.approvalRequired: Approval required. {id} Review in the Approvals page.
supplierReturnsPage.receivingHint: Returns linked to a receiving line are preferred. Manual returns may require approval.

purchaseOrdersPage.title: Purchase Orders
purchaseOrdersPage.subtitle: Draft, approve, and update purchase orders before receiving stock.
purchaseOrdersPage.approvalRequired: Approval required. {id} Open the Approvals page to review.
purchaseOrdersPage.editApprovalHint: Editing an approved order will request approval again before changes apply.
purchaseOrdersPage.unitHintPurchase: Select the unit you're purchasing in. The system tracks stock in the base unit and converts automatically.

purchasesPage.title: Purchases
purchasesPage.subtitle: Create direct purchases and record payments.
purchasesPage.offlineCacheUnavailable: Offline cache unavailable. Connect to sync.
purchasesPage.offlineSyncBlocked: Offline sync is blocked. Reconnect before adding drafts.
purchasesPage.offlinePinRequired: Enter the offline PIN before creating drafts.
purchasesPage.bankTransferReference: Bank transfer payments require a reference.
purchasesPage.branchRequired: Select a branch before creating a purchase.
purchasesPage.supplierRequired: Select a supplier before creating a purchase.
purchasesPage.noValidLines: Add at least one valid purchase line.
purchasesPage.emptyDescription: Create your first purchase to start tracking supplier invoices and payments.
purchasesPage.unitHintPurchase: Select the unit you're purchasing in. The system tracks stock in the base unit and converts automatically.

receivingPage.title: Receiving
receivingPage.subtitle: Record incoming stock from purchases and purchase orders. Provide an override reason when unit costs change or quantities exceed the order.
receivingPage.offlineCacheUnavailable: Offline cache unavailable. Connect to sync.
receivingPage.targetRequired: Select a purchase or purchase order before receiving.
receivingPage.overrideReason: Override reason (required for overages or cost changes)

productWizardPage.title: Product Creation Wizard
productWizardPage.subtitle: Create products, variants, pricing, and initial stock in one flow.
productWizardPage.validationError: Add a product name, select a category, and include at least one variant.
productWizardPage.scanAssignSubtitle: Use the camera to assign a barcode to {variant}.
productWizardPage.scanCameraFailed: Unable to access camera for scanning.
productWizardPage.conversionHint: 1 sell unit equals this many base units.
productWizardPage.initialStockHint: Optional: record opening stock via positive adjustment.
productWizardPage.confirmCancel: Discard this wizard and return to products?

posPage.title: Point of Sale
posPage.subtitle: Fast checkout with branch-aware controls and a product-first layout.
posPage.productsHint: Tap a product tile to add it to the cart.
posPage.branchSelectRequired: Select a branch to start selling.
posPage.branchRequired: Select a branch before adding items.
posPage.unitPriceAutoAdjustHint: Unit changes auto-adjust price using the variant conversion factor.
posPage.pinInvalid: Invalid offline PIN. {remaining} attempt(s) before lockout.
posPage.pinLocked: Too many failed PIN attempts. Locked until {until}.
posPage.offlineBanner: You are operating offline. Sales will be queued and synced when reconnected.
posPage.indexedDbError: Offline storage is unavailable (private browsing or storage quota exceeded). Offline mode will not work.
posPage.missingPrice: Variant does not have a default price.
posPage.outOfStock: This item is out of stock.
posPage.noMatch: No variant matched the scan or search.
posPage.openShiftRequired: Open a shift before completing POS sales.
posPage.offlineSyncBlocked: Offline sync is blocked. Reconnect before adding sales.
posPage.offlinePinRequired: Enter the offline PIN before completing sales.
posPage.offlineCacheUnavailable: Offline cache unavailable. Connect to sync.
posPage.openShiftDesc: Enter your opening cash balance to begin this shift.
posPage.staleCacheWarning: Offline catalog is over 4 hours old. Prices or VAT rates may have changed. Sync when connected.
posPage.saleParked: Sale parked. You can resume it later.

suspended.title: Account Suspended
suspended.description: Your business account has been suspended. Please contact your business owner for details.
